missing.ask_the_ai_tutor_a_question: Ask the AI tutor a question
missing.distributive_property_a_b_c_a_b_a_c: 💡 Distributive Property: a × (b + c) = a×b + a×c
missing.break_multi_digit_numbers_into_tens_an: 💡 Break multi-digit numbers into tens and ones, multiply each pair, then add!
missing.the_grid_is_the_picture_multiplication: The grid is the picture. Multiplication is the math.
missing.pick_a_story_look_at_the_matching_grid: Pick a story. Look at the matching grid. Multiplication is the count of things in a rectangle. 5 solved earns the 📝 Word Wizard badge.
missing.a_b_is_the_area_of_an_a_by_b_rectangle: a × b is the area of an a-by-b rectangle. This is THE bridge from skip-counting to multiplication. Common Core 3.MD.7: relate area to multiplication and addition.
missing.distributive_split_the_rectangle_keep_: Distributive — split the rectangle, keep the area
missing.a_b_c_ab_ac_cut_a_4_7_grid_into_a_4_5_: a(b+c) = ab + ac. Cut a 4×7 grid into a 4×5 + 4×2; same total. The distributive property is the algebraic backbone of every later expansion. Common Core 3.OA.5.
missing.break_factors_by_place_value_23_47_20_: Break factors by place value: 23×47 = (20+3)(40+7) = 800 + 140 + 120 + 21 = 1081. Bridge to the lattice method, then standard algorithm. Common Core 4.NBT.5.
missing.word_problems_multiplication_in_the_wo: Word Problems — multiplication in the world
missing.a_garden_with_4_rows_of_6_plants_a_the: A garden with 4 rows of 6 plants. A theater with 8 rows of 12 seats. Every multiplication fact lives inside a real-world rectangle. Common Core 3.OA.3, 4.OA.2.
missing.b_d_p_w_switch_mode_n_new_challenge_c_: ⌨️ B/D/P/W: switch mode | N: new challenge | C: commutative | ?: AI tutor
missing.sliders_for_rows_cols_discrete_4_state: Sliders for rows × cols. Discrete 4-state classification. No score, no reveal.
missing.hypothesis_when_does_area_rows_cols: Hypothesis: When does area = rows + cols?
missing.find_sizes_where_area_perimeter_rare_i: Find sizes where area = perimeter (rare integers).
missing.when_does_swapping_rows_cols_change_an: When does swapping rows/cols change anything?
missing.explain_commutative_property_area_leng: Explain commutative property + area = length × width.
missing.design_note_discrete_4_state_classific: Design note: discrete 4-state classification; no area-test score; no reveal — by design.
